ci_support_linux_64_mpimpich.yaml:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
fortran_compiler:
- gfortran
fortran_compiler_version:
- '14'
hdf5:
- 1.14.6
libnetcdf:
- 4.10.0
mpi:
- mpich
mpich:
- '4'
netcdf_fortran:
- '4.6'
openmpi:
- '5'
perl:
- 5.32.1
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version
  - fortran_compiler_version

name: esmf

about.summary:
The Earth System Modeling Framework (ESMF) is software for building and
coupling weather, climate, and related models.

The Earth System Modeling Framework (ESMF) is software for building and
coupling weather, climate, and related models.

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  version: "8.9.1"
  build: 1
  mpi: ${{ mpi or "nompi" }}
  build_number: ${{ build + 100 if mpi == "mpich" else build }}
  mpi_prefix: ${{ "mpi_" + mpi if mpi != "nompi" else "nompi" }}

package:
  name: esmf
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/esmf-org/esmf/archive/refs/tags/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: e3fafd0c057bf1c3b4c41c997b392016d621b1f1a7c601355c325a7f58425d78
  patches:
    # remove these very long running tests only for aarch64 nompi (which is hanging)
    - if: aarch64 and mpi == "nompi"
      then:
        - 0001-remove-long-running-tests-aarch64.patch
    # Sequence of Windows targeting patches; should be unix compatible
    - 0002-Add-x86_64-machine-id-for-MinGW.gfortran.patch
    - 0003-Change-long-int-to-long-long-for-Windows-compatibili.patch
    - 0004-Deal-with-command-line-length-limitations.patch
    - 0005-Deactivate-ESMF_NETCDF-way-of-specifying-nc-config.patch
    - 0006-Replace-flaky-abspath-script-with-make-s-abspath-fun.patch
    - 0007-Make-pathtype-recognize-Windows-style-absolute-paths.patch
    - 0008-Hack-in-windows-naming-conventions.patch
    - 0009-pio-for-osx.patch
    - 0010-windows-exports.patch
    # remove a different set of very long running tests only for osx and mpich (also hanging)
    - if: osx and mpi == "mpich"
      then:
        - 0011-remove-long-running-tests-osx-mpich.patch

build:
  number: ${{ build_number }}

  # add build string so packages can depend on
  # mpi or nompi variants explicitly:
  # `esmf * mpi_mpich_*` for mpich
  # `esmf * mpi_*` for any mpi
  # `esmf * nompi_*` for no mpi
  string: ${{ mpi_prefix }}_h${{ hash }}_${{ build_number }}

  # There is a compiler error in the current Windows version of gcc, see
  # https://github.com/conda-forge/esmf-feedstock/pull/109#issuecomment-1795477835
  skip:
    - win

requirements:
  build:
    # General
    - perl
    - cmake
    - gnuconfig
    - if: mpi == "openmpi" and build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - ${{ mpi }}
        - netcdf-fortran * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
        - hdf5 * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
        - libnetcdf * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    # Unix
    - if: unix
      then:
        - ${{ compiler("c") }}
        - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
        - ${{ compiler("cxx") }}
        - ${{ compiler("fortran") }}
        - make
        - pkg-config
    # Win
    - if: win
      then:
        - ${{ compiler("m2w64_c") }}
        - ${{ stdlib("m2w64_c") }}
        - ${{ compiler("m2w64_cxx") }}
        - ${{ compiler("m2w64_fortran") }}
        - m2-autoconf
        - m2-grep
        - m2-make
        - m2-sed
        - m2-which
        - m2w64-pkg-config
        - m2w64-dlfcn
  host:
    # need to list netcdf-fortran, hdf5 and libnetcdf twice to get version
    # pinning from variants and build pinning from ${{ mpi_prefix }}
    - netcdf-fortran
    - netcdf-fortran * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    - libnetcdf
    - libnetcdf * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    - hdf5
    - hdf5 * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    - if: mpi != "nompi"
      then:
        - ${{ mpi }}
        - parallelio 2.6.9.*
  run:
    - netcdf-fortran * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    - libnetcdf * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    - hdf5 * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    - if: mpi != "nompi"
      then:
        - ${{ mpi }}
    - if: mpi == "openmpi"
      then:
        - openssh

tests:
  - script:
      - ESMF_PrintInfo
      - ESMF_RegridWeightGen --help
      - if: unix
        then:
          - test -f ${ESMFMKFILE}
      - if: win
        then:
          - if not exist %ESMFMKFILE% exit 1

about:
  homepage: http://earthsystemmodeling.org/
  license: NCSA
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: |
    The Earth System Modeling Framework (ESMF) is software for building and
    coupling weather, climate, and related models.
  repository: https://github.com/esmf-org/esmf
  documentation: https://earthsystemmodeling.org/doc/

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - billsacks
    - zklaus
    - ocefpaf
    - rokuingh
    - xylar
